# Accountants.co.ke

> Kenya's directory of verified CPA-K, ACCA and CIFA accounting firms and
> professionals, with a job board and private client matching. Searching and
> getting matched are free. Firm listings come from the ICPAK register; firms
> claim and verify their own listing.

## Key pages
- [Firms directory](https://accountants.co.ke/directory): every ICPAK-licensed accounting firm in Kenya, searchable. Firms can claim their listing.
- [Get matched](https://accountants.co.ke/match): tell us the service and location, get connected privately with verified firms.
- [Accounting services](https://accountants.co.ke/services): tax, audit, bookkeeping, payroll, VAT, eTIMS, rental income tax and more.
- [Guides](https://accountants.co.ke/guides): plain-language guides to Kenyan tax and compliance (rental income tax, eTIMS, VAT).
- [Best firms by need](https://accountants.co.ke/best): how to choose an accounting firm in Kenya by sector and location, with verified ICPAK-licensed firms to compare.
- [Accounting jobs](https://accountants.co.ke/jobs): finance and accounting roles across Kenya.
- [Accounting careers](https://accountants.co.ke/careers): how to qualify as an accountant in Kenya (KASNEB CPA, ICPAK), join the Big Four, salaries, and find jobs.
- [Grow your practice](https://accountants.co.ke/grow-your-practice): for accounting firms, how to get clients, start a practice and market within ICPAK rules.
- [How it works](https://accountants.co.ke/how-it-works)
- [About](https://accountants.co.ke/about)
- [FAQ](https://accountants.co.ke/faq)
- [Contact](https://accountants.co.ke/contact)

## Notes
- We are a directory and matching service, not an accountancy firm; we do not provide accounting, tax or audit advice.
- We are independent and not affiliated with ICPAK or any regulator.
- Data is handled under the Kenya Data Protection Act, 2019. See https://accountants.co.ke/privacy
